title: Pack of 2 PY.10 Pure Yarn Cotton Mop Head Replacement With Galvanised Socket - Heavy Duty for All-Around Floor Cleaning
features: Pack of 2, PY.10 Industrial Replacement Mop Heads – Available in 2 packs or 5 packs, with 4 floor mop sizes! Comes with PY.10, PY.12, PY.14, and PY.16, choose the offer that best fits your needs. These string mop heads are ideal to be used in households, offices, and can be kept in stock for janitorial supplies. No need to replace your mop sticks more often with this traditional mop head replacement.

Highly Absorbent Pure Yarn Mop – Made from traditional braiding pure yarn. This floor cleaning mop head is highly absorbent and can be used dry or damp to clean any spills or dirt. Pure yarn floor mops are soft and are ideal to be used on use on smooth surface flooring such as laminated, wooden, and tiled floors.

Galvanised Metal Mop Socket – This reinforced metal mop socket will not easily rust and can firmly support heavy duty cleaning. The cotton mop head socket is push-fit and is compatible with all types of mop sticks such as wooden or metal. The head and handle attachment is secured with a screw.

Industrial and Commercial Mop Quality – Ideal for cleaning your flooring at home, in the office, schools, fast-food chains, establishments, or in the public environment this heavy-duty floor cleaner mop will do the job with ease. The materials used in the metal mop socket and yarn head ensure durability and good liquid absorption.

Trusted Brand – Supplied by the Dustpan and Brush Store with end-user in mind! We specialise in all cleaning equipment such as brooms, brushes, mops, and dustpans for domestic, commercial, and industrial cleaning. These heavy duty mop heads with galvanised sockets will do their job of keeping your floor clean and will last for a long time.
